name: deepseek-detached-agent
description: Run DeepSeek as a detached subagent, write the final answer to Markdown, and fall back to Claude CLI.

scripts.check: node --check src/api-error.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/deepseek-request.js && node --check src/session-memory.js && node --check src/deepseek-watch.js && node --check src/deepseek-detached.js && node --check src/wait-for-file.js
scripts.smoke: node src/deepseek-watch.js --help && node src/deepseek-detached.js --help && node src/wait-for-file.js --help
